pipeline_params.description: Chuzom v0.5.0: weighted signal scoring (intent×3 + topic×2 + format×1) across six task categories, MCQ fast-path (\boxed{X}), LiveCodeBench fast-path, benchmark template matching, math benchmark prefix stripping (AsDiv/FinQA/AIME), and dedicated deep_reasoning tier (DeepSeek-R1 / o3). Self-contained heuristic — no LLM calls during routing.
